title: Tasks scheduled on a holiday to show up in workload view
excerpt: It’d be great if a task is scheduled on a holiday (set in the work schedule) would show up on the workload view. Currently that task & the hours assigned to it don’t show so we’ve had employees be overbooked for weeks th…

posts.author: jessica.krause (Jessica)
posts.cookedHtml: It’d be great if a task is scheduled on a holiday (set in the work schedule) would show up on the workload view. Currently that task & the hours assigned to it don’t show so we’ve had employees be overbooked for weeks that included holidays. Haven’t found a workaround because we still need holidays to reduce the hours available for staff shown in the workload view.

posts.author: Michaleiba (Michal Leiba)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I am Michal from the spot-nik team. We just launched a new app- SuperPlanner. I believe it answers your needs. SuperPlanner can add any type of off days you’d like and as many types as you’d like.
I wonder if this is still relevant for you, but here it is-

https://auth.monday.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=a72397016954aa33e272936988566142&response_type=install

Let me know what you think
